title: Orchard Toys Dinosaur Dominoes Mini Game, Small and Compact, Travel Game, A Fun Dinosaur Themed Domino Game, Perfect For Children Age 3-5
features: FUN DINO-THEMED TWIST ON DOMINOES: This game puts a prehistoric spin on traditional dominoes, where players race to play their cards by matching dinosaurs to create a continuous line. This interactive game is perfect for young dinosaur fans.

DEVELOPS MATCHING AND OBSERVATION SKILLS: As children match the correct dinosaurs to the domino line, they practice observation and matching skills in a playful way. Older players can also enjoy discussing the different types of dinosaurs on the cards, sparking curiosity and conversation about prehistoric creatures.

COMPACT, TRAVEL-FRIENDLY GAME FOR ON-THE-GO FUN: Part of Orchard Toys' mini games series, this compact and portable game is ideal for home or travel. Supporting 2-4 players and designed for ages 3-5, it’s an excellent choice for quick play sessions, making it easy to bring along for fun wherever you are!
SUSTAINABLE: Our high-quality and durable games are crafted from recycled cardboard and use non-toxic inks. The wipe clean pieces are designed to withstand wear and tear and messy hands.

ORCHARD TOYS: We've been making educational games and puzzles for over 50 years. Trusted by parents, schools, and childcare settings, our high quality products will stand the test of time for generations to come.ORCHARD TOYS: We've been making educational games and puzzles for over 50 years. Trusted by parents, schools, and childcare settings, our high quality products will stand the test of time for generations to come.
description: From the manufacturer Mini Travel Games Smaller than any of our other games, these travel size mini games are perfect for fun and learning both at home and away. Based on traditional gameplay and covering a range of learning skills from matching to counting, mini games will provide fun for all the family. Mini games are the perfect gift and make great stocking fillers. Key Features Travel Size Mini games are packed in small, compact box - the perfect size to pack in a suitcase, travel bag or handbag! Engaging Gameplay All of the mini games feature quick and simple yet engaging gameplay, great for keeping children entertained for short periods when at home or away. Fun Characters Children will love the range of colourful animal, dinosaur and insect characters featured in the mini games - all of which help to make learning fun! Orchard Toys Mini Games Range About Orchard Toys Orchard Toys have been making educational games and jigsaws in Britain for over 50 years. The emphasis is on ‘learning made fun’, meaning parents can benefit from Orchard Toys trusted educational values whilst children will have so much fun they’ll want to play time and time again. Orchard Toys products will stand the test of time against constant playing, wear and tear and messy hands.
